title: Reach Display (maintained)
description: A configurable visual representation of your reach and hit distances.  Originally by Wolren
body:
The goal of this mod is to allow you to display the distance between you and the enemy player/mob, + see how far your hits reached them. It's useful information that helps one to control combo distances and align look angles to optimize the distance. Everything — text size, color, placement, shadow, decimal places — is configurable.

The mod has 3 different displays:
- **Distance**
  
  Displays the distance from your eye to the enemy's hitbox
- **Hit Distance**
  
  Displays the distance of your last hit
- **Average Hit Distance**
  
  The average of either the last X hits or the local/global session hit distances

 
_Please note, this mod and a lot of the code was originally written by Wolren. I maintain and update a separate (1.21.5+) fork. For older versions, his work is published here [https://modrinth.com/mod/reach-display](https://modrinth.com/mod/reach-display)_
